gigapan.name: Haus der Meeres Aquarium in a WWII flak tower
gigapan.description:
The 'House of the Sea' is located in a WWII 'fire control flak tower.'


The sign on the top is "a memorial against war and fascism designed by Lawrence Weiner."

It reads: 

ZERSCHMETTERT IN STUCKE (shattered into pieces.)
(IM FRIEDEN DER NACHT)

And the English on the sign reads:
IN THE STILL OF THE NIGHT


Imported from local Gigapan Stitcher file: gphausdermeeres_1_8x11 | Source: /Volumes/bigeneration/europe_2009/gigapans_start_20091222
